name: Vietnam Grand Discovery Classic 18 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Sapa - Ninh Binh - Halong Bay - Hoi An - Hue - Ho Chi Minh City - Mekong Delta - Phu Quoc
places: Meals:16 Breakfasts, 5 Lunches, 1 Brunch, 2 Picnic Lunch, 2 Dinner
highlights: Get the true sense of Vietnam through attractions in big cities like Hanoi & Ho Chi Minh
Dive into the mesmerizing emerald waters of Tam Coc and Halong Bay as well as discover their magnificent views
Enjoy the tranquil and slow pace of the locals in the Hoi An Old Quarter and the former capital of Hue
Unveil the unique charm of Can Tho, where vibrant waterways and lively markets come together in harmony

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival - Welcome Dinner at Fine Dining Restaurant
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Noi Bai International Airport in Hanoi, you will be warmly welcomed by your local guide and transferred to your hotel in the city center. Take some time to rest and refresh after your flight. The hotel's check-in time is 14:00. There will be an extra charge if you would like an early check-in time. In the evening, you will head to one of Hanoi’s top fine dining restaurants

itinerary.title: Half-day Around Hanoi - Bus from Hanoi to Sapa
itinerary.description:
Morning

Following breakfast, head to the hotel lobby to meet our tour guide, who will be waiting to take you to some of the most popular religious sites in Hanoi:

The Temple of Literature is our first destination. Founded in the Ly Dynasty, Temple of Literature is Vietnam's first national university dedicated to the study of Confucius, the philosopher from China. Next, we go to the famous temple One Pillar Pagoda, which is situated in the same neighborhood as The Temples of Literature - Ba Dinh. With the shape representing the national flower - lotus, the temple implied a significant expansi...

itinerary.title: Sapa - Trekking Through Sapa’s Hill Tribe Villages and Terraced Fields
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 09:30, start your walk via isolated North Vietnamese villages, begin from the stunning and untamed Y Linh Ho village, a secluded commune nestled in the Muong Hoa Valley. Along the journey, you'll pass by large cornfields and lovely, verdant terraced fields. Visit Lao Chai village, where minor communities like Giay and Black H'Mong live. Because of its charming natural surroundings and welcoming locals, Lao Chai village is definitely the location that calms the minds of retreat seekers. Afternoon

Discover Ta Van Village - village in a valley surrounded by rice paddies and crossed b...

itinerary.title: Cat Cat - Sin Chai Village - Hanoi - Road transfer
itinerary.description:
Morning

Following breakfast, you will check out of the hotel. About 08:00, we will kick off the journey to Cat Cat Village, one of Sapa's most picturesque and lyrically isolated communities where the Mong ethnic group has recently resided and worked. Before the afternoon excursion, have a picnic lunch next to the river and relax for a little while. Afternoon 

Continue your journey on foot to Sin Chai Village, a Red Dao community located at the base of the Hoang Lien Son mountain range. We learn more about the culture of the North by observing the individuals wearing silver jewelry and embroi...

itinerary.title: Full-day Discover Ancient Hoa Lu and Scenic Tam Coc (Join-in)
itinerary.description:
Morning

We will start the road trip to Ninh Binh between 07:15 and 07:45 after enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel. En route, enjoy the picturesque landscapes when the city gradually turns into countryside. Take a leisurely boat excursion in Ninh Binh and enjoy the fresh air amidst vast rice fields. For two hours, you will travel along Tam Coc's Ngo Dong River in a tiny boat rowed by locals while taking in the breathtaking scenery. Afternoon 

Following a break after lunchtime, around 13:30, you can engage in extra activities like going fishing, visiting locals, riding a bicycle arou...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay - Overnight On Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Following breakfast, from 08:00 - 08:30, there will be a vehicle coming to pick you up at your accommodation and drive you to Halong, which is 2.5 hours away. You have to finish a few check-in formalities when you get to the cruise port before you can begin your journey. Get a glass of something cool to drink and a friendly greeting from the boat staff. Following that, you might enjoy a delectable dinner of freshly caught seafood served onboard while seeing the magnificent Halong Bay panorama as the boat passes by a range of limestones. Afternoon

After taking a brief break, guests ca...

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi Fly To Da Nang
itinerary.description:
Morning

Wake up early to practice Tai Chi in the sparkling dawn background of Halong Bay. There are more exercise activities such as Yoga or Vovinam for passengers to improve health. For more information, you could ask our consultants as some ships may provide unique activities. Depending on the cruise's timetable, we might have a final excursion to a well-known Halong attraction after breakfast. Then, return to the cruise and get your stuff ready for check-out

itinerary.title: Half-day Wander Through the Ancient Alleys of Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Morning / Afternoon

Your tour takes you first to the Hoi An Market, a lively maze of stalls overflowing with fresh produce, handcrafted goods, and the energetic rhythm of daily local life. The mix of colors, scents, and chatter creates an atmosphere that captures the very essence of the ancient town. A short stroll brings you to the Phuc Kien Chinese Assembly Hall, known for its vivid architecture, symbolic dragon figures, and ornate roofs. While exploring the hall, you’ll gain a deeper understanding of ancestor worship as you observe the altar and see residents offering prayers. From there, ...

itinerary.title: Leisure Day in Hoi An - Enjoy the Town's Peaceful Spirit
itinerary.description:
Morning /Afternoon

Today is your free day. You can explore Hoi An Ancient Town by yourself. Or in case you want a deeper understanding of this charming town, consider choosing among these optional Hoi An tours of BestPrice:

Hoi An Vespa Tour Half Day

	

FROM US $110 /pax




My Son Sanctuary Half-Day Tour from Hoi An

	

FROM US $48 /pax




Life as A Farmer in Cam Thanh Village

	

FROM US $79 /pax




Hoi An Memories Show

	

FROM US $24 /pax

itinerary.title: Hoi An to Hue: Road Transfer - Indulge in a Luxury Dinner Cruise on Perfume River
itinerary.description:
Morning /Afternoon

You will be transferred to Hue via Hai Van Pass. Now is the time for you to rest and check in at your hotel when you get to Hue City. Evening

As the sun gently sets over the Perfume River, step aboard a traditional Ngu Thuyen (royal boat) for a captivating journey through Hue's rich cultural tapestry. Your evening begins with a serene Royal Tea Ceremony as the boat glides upstream. Sip delicate teas once reserved for royalty while soaking in the tranquil ambiance and scenic beauty of the riverbanks

itinerary.title: Half-day Journey Through Hue’s Imperial Heritage (SIC)
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Our first attraction in Hue is Thien Mu Pagoda, also known as the Pagoda of the Celestial Lady. This stunning royal architecture dates back to one of the oldest pagodas in Hue. Discover the Imperial Citadel, where the Nguyen Dynasty ruled for more than a century, and its exquisite architecture made by talented Vietnamese artisans. Lastly, we visit Dong Ba Market for the sake of people who want to go shopping to browse for mementos, sample regional cuisine, and also get a glimpse of local life. After that, return to your hotel and unwind there for the remainder of the day.

itinerary.title: Hue - Fly To Ho Chi Minh
itinerary.description: Following a hearty breakfast at your hotel in Hue, you will be driven to Phu Bai Airport to board your flight to vibrant Ho Chi Minh City. Upon landing at Tan Son Nhat International Airport, you’ll be welcomed by your driver and transferred to your hotel in the city center. After completing the check-in process, take some time to unwind, refresh yourself, or enjoy a short rest before continuing your journey.

itinerary.title: Mekong Delta - Can Tho (Join-in)
itinerary.description:
Morning

Today, you'll depart from Ho Chi Minh City at 08:00 to be ready for your trip across the Mekong Delta. You will disembark from the boat and enter a craft workshop where you can sample local products such as rice paper, popcorn, coconut candy, and traditional wine. You can purchase mementos outside the factory to give as presents to your loved ones. After that, you board the boat at Cai Be and travel for roughly 20 minutes to reach Sampan, arriving at Tan Phong Island. Guests are free to remain on the boat if they would prefer not to visit Sampan

itinerary.title: Cai Rang Floating Market - Ho Chi Minh
itinerary.description:
Morning

You will begin the day with a comfortable transfer from your hotel to the pier, where a wooden boat awaits to take you to the Cai Rang floating market. As the boat moves along the river, you’ll have a clear view of the busy trading activities that make this market one of the most dynamic places in the Mekong Delta. It’s an ideal opportunity to observe how local people live and work on the water every day. During the journey, you will stop at a small noodle workshop to see how traditional noodles are made, a simple but interesting part of local culture. You’ll also get to enjoy some fr...

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Take a Flight to Phu Quoc
itinerary.description:
Morning

For today, you'll have free time and wait to be taken to the airport after having breakfast. The group will be greeted by a driver as soon as you land at the Phu Quoc airport then move to the hotel you have booked. Spend the remainder of the day relaxing after checking in the hotel in Phu Quoc.

itinerary.title: Departure from Phu Quoc - Farewell to Vietnam
itinerary.description:
Morning

On the last day, you will be taken to the airport for your department flight after having breakfast at the hotel. So, that would mark the end of your journey. We all hope that you enjoy our trip and keep memorable moments with you about our lovely Vietnam!

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel
All transport and transfer by air conditioned vehicle (including airport pick up and see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Domestic flight Hanoi – Da Nang, Hue - Ho Chi Minh, Ho Chi Minh - Phu Quoc
Sharing luxury limousine Hanoi - Sapa - Hanoi
Shuttle bus Hanoi - Ha Long Bay - Hanoi
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
